# llms.txt — aomanbot.com
> AOMAN FUTURE: AI-powered service robots for delivery, cleaning, and humanoid interaction.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://aomanbot.com/): Service robots overview
- [Products](https://aomanbot.com/products/cruzr): CRUZR service robot, CLEINBOT cleaning robots, CADEBOT delivery robots
- [Solutions](https://aomanbot.com/solutions): Industry solutions for hospitality, healthcare, retail
- [Technology](https://aomanbot.com/technology): SLAM navigation, computer vision, voice AI
- [Blog](https://aomanbot.com/blog): Robotics industry insights
- [About](https://aomanbot.com/about): Company info, partners

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2015
- Patents: 1,800+
- Countries: 100+
- Robots Deployed: 50,000+
- Certification: ISO 13482 safety certified
- Partners: Tencent, Huawei, Siemens, Marriott, BYD
